page.title: Niconi Commons IDs
page.description: Browse installed packages that have registered Niconi Commons IDs

guide.title: What is a Niconi Commons ID?
guide.body:
Niconi Commons is a service that helps creators collaborate and safely reuse each other's work.
On Niconico, you can register the tools and assets used to make your work, such as AviUtl2, plugins, scripts, and materials, as parent works to build a content tree.
Registering parent works when posting a video lets the creators of those tools and assets know they are appreciated and supports their work.
Niconico also provides systems that can lead to financial support for creators.
Please consider registering parent works for the tools and assets you use.
guide.note: Note: registering parent works does not reduce your own revenue.
